purpose: Extension manifest. Declares VS Code contributes (commands, keybindings, settings, views, viewsContainers) and runtime metadata (engines, activationEvents).
invariants: main field points to ./src/extension.js — the entrypoint VS Code loads.
engines.vscode constrains compatibility; bumping requires updating the README minimum.
activationEvents includes onStartupFinished so extension activates without explicit user action.
contributes.commands and src/extension.js + src/aiu.js registerCommand calls must agree on every id.
gotchas: Adding a new command requires both a contributes.commands entry AND a registerCommand call — silent breakage if either is missed.
Configuration property keys collide with cfg.get(...) lookups across the codebase; renaming requires a code-wide search.
